title: Research Synthesis
description: Given a research topic, gather sources, extract facts and quotes in parallel, synthesize them into a coherent narrative, and format a final report.

gather_sources.name: Gather Sources
gather_sources.does: Find and collect candidate sources for the topic

extract_facts.name: Extract Facts
extract_facts.does: Pull factual claims with attributions from sources

extract_quotes.name: Extract Quotes
extract_quotes.does: Pull direct quotes worth citing from sources

synthesize.name: Synthesize
synthesize.does: Weave facts and quotes into a coherent narrative

format_report.name: Format Report
format_report.does: Render synthesis into a polished PDF with citations

deliverable.description: Research report (PDF + Markdown) with source-level provenance.
